arts.ttl: Serie A Liveblog inc Roma-Inter, Empoli-Napoli, Venezia-Atalanta
Serie A: Roma vs Inter – probable line-ups and where to watch on TV
arts.sum: It’s an Argentinean derby between Roma and Inter as Paulo Dybala and Lautaro Martinez lead...

Since 2021 Roma have lost six of their eight Serie A matches against Inter (W1 D1); in this period, the Nerazzurri have won the most games against the Giallorossi in the competition. Roma have scored in each of their last 24 home Serie A games; the Giallorossi could register a longer streak in home matches for the first time since the period between December 2015 and September 2017 (34 in that case).

arts.ttl: How Inter Will Line Up Against Roma After Crucial Injury Boost
arts.sum: There's a heavyweight clash awaiting defending Serie A champions Inter later this evening as they head to the Stadio Olimpico to meet Roma. With Napoli already two points clear and Juventus narrowly edging Lazio last night, Simone Inzaghi's men have little margin for error to keep up with the pace. The post How Inter Will Line Up Against Roma After Crucial Injury Boost appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Juric: “Inter are without weaknesses, Dovbyk has recovered”
arts.sum: Roma manager Ivan Juric held a press conference ahead of his team’s upcoming match against Inter Milan, addressing various topics including player fitness and tactical considerations. Regarding key players Paulo Dybala and Artem Dovbyk, Juric provided positive updates: “Artem returned with a small discomfort but has recovered. Paulo has gone through a recovery phase and has now had four great training sessions. He will be managed based on how the match goes, but they are both doing well.” Juric acknowledged the challenge of facing Inter, stating, “We know everything about Inter. arts.ttl: Inzaghi: “Berenbruch will be in the squad to face Roma”
arts.sum: Inter Milan manager Simone Inzaghi addressed the media ahead of his team’s upcoming Serie A match against Roma. The coach discussed various topics, including the team’s preparation, player fitness, and tactical considerations. Inzaghi emphasized the importance of maintaining focus after the international break, stating, “The national team break should not influence us. Before the break, we had three victories, and we must continue our path.” He acknowledged that some players returned with minor issues but assured that the team had trained well in the past few days. arts.ttl: Inzaghi eager to fuel Inter momentum at Roma
arts.sum: Simone Inzaghi wants to keep that Inter ‘momentum’ going against Roma, even after the break...

arts.ttl: Inter Milan’s Thomas Berenbruch receives first senior call-up
arts.sum: Inter Milan are facing a midfield crisis as they prepare for their challenging away fixture in Rome. With Kristjan Asllani and Piotr Zielinski both dealing with minor issues, coach Simone Inzaghi is exploring solutions to address the situation. One such solution comes from the club’s youth ranks, as Inzaghi turns to a familiar face in Thomas Berenbruch. Calciomercato report how the 18-year-old midfielder, born in 2005, is no stranger to Inzaghi’s methods, having spent the entire pre-season training with the first team and participating in summer friendlies.
